h1: Baxi Boiler Repair in London and Sussex
intro: We provide Baxi boiler repair across London and Sussex for ignition faults, pressure problems, leaks, hot water issues and general breakdown diagnosis.
pricingGuidance: Baxi repair pricing depends on the fault found, the model and whether parts are needed after diagnosis.
localProof: Booked for Baxi faults across London and Sussex by homeowners and landlords who need a clear diagnosis and reliable next-step advice.
commonFaults: No hot water or weak performance

sections.heading: Common Baxi repair calls
sections.body: Typical call-outs involve ignition problems, poor hot water, pressure loss and leaks that trigger shutdowns or unreliable performance.

sections.heading: Why brand-specific symptoms still need diagnosis
sections.body: A Baxi boiler can show brand-specific behaviour, but the real fault still has to be confirmed before parts are ordered or replaced.

sections.heading: How we approach repair decisions
sections.body: We explain the fault, the likely repair route and whether the cost still makes sense compared with the age and condition of the boiler.
